accepted_packet_reassignment_allowed: Rehearsal report written before normal and error scenarios completed
error_flow_unrecovered: Observed error flow could not recover or expose a repair boundary
foreground_final_preflight_missing: Foreground final-return preflight was missing from rehearsal
internal_helper_only: Rehearsal used an internal helper instead of the public CLI black box
lifecycle_patrol_allows_nonterminal_stop: Lifecycle patrol allowed nonterminal Controller stop
lifecycle_repeated_wait_not_recovered: Rehearsal report written before normal and error scenarios completed
Lifecycle patrol failed to classify repeated wait as recovery
lifecycle_resume_from_chat: Lifecycle resume used chat history instead of current-run ledger
missing_ack_result_accepted: Missing-ACK result was accepted as authoritative
missing_current_result_fields_accepted: Missing current result fields were accepted instead of reissued with required fields
missing_current_result_reissue_missing_i: Missing-current-result-field reissue omitted required field names or repair instruction
passive_wait_completed: Rehearsal report written before normal and error scenarios completed
Passive wait was treated as completion instead of foreground duty
planning_chain_terminal: Planning packet chain reached terminal completion before route nodes
result_body_leak: Public status leaked a sealed role result body
route_mutation_without_frontier_rewrite: Route mutation did not rewrite the execution frontier
scoped_closure_final_return_allowed: Rehearsal report written before normal and error scenarios completed
Scoped closure allowed final return while later work remained
side_command_surface_available: Unsupported side-command completion surface was still available
slow_live_reviewer_replaced: Rehearsal report written before normal and error scenarios completed
Slow live reviewer progress caused replacement instead of patrol wait
startup_body_leak: Public status leaked the sealed startup body
terminal_active_lease: Terminal status retained an active lease
terminal_missing_role_packet: Terminal status did not include all required role packets
terminal_missing_route_node: Final route-wide ledger built before three route nodes completed
Terminal completion missed an effective route node
wrong_role_lease_accepted: Wrong-role lease was accepted against another role's packet

dead_lease_advances_node: dead or inactive lease advanced a node
final_without_requirement_matrix: terminal closure completed before final requirement-evidence matrix
final closure passed without requirement-evidence matrix
missing_node_terminal_complete: final route-wide ledger built before all node dispositions
terminal closure passed with an incomplete effective node
mutation_without_frontier_rewrite: route mutation did not rewrite execution frontier
node_task_without_acceptance_plan: node 2 task started before acceptance plan
node task packet issued without accepted node acceptance plan
parent_without_backward_replay_accepted: parent/module node accepted without backward replay
planning_without_high_standard_gates: PM planning accepted before high-standard preplanning gates
route planning proceeded without high-standard preplanning gates
pm_plan_terminal_complete: PM planning packet chain reached terminal completion
quality_gap_mutated_route_by_default: ordinary quality gap mutated route instead of same-node repair
stale_node_evidence_accepted: stale node evidence was accepted after route/source change
wrong_flowguard_target_accepted: wrong FlowGuard modeled target satisfied a node

payload.error: assignment responsibility does not match packet
final foreground return is not allowed
final foreground return is not allowed
final foreground return is not allowed
run is terminal (stopped_by_user); new work is not allowed
